sections.paragraph:
f. (from מָשַׁל) Mic 4:8 constr. מֶמְשֶׁלֶת ( Gen 1:16 Psa 136:8), with suff. מֶמְשַׁלְתְּךָ Isa 22:21, pl. constr. מֶמְשְׁלֹות, מַמְשְׁלֹות-

(1) dominion, rule, Gen 1:16 Psa 136:8.

(2) dominions, jurisdiction, 2Ki 20:13.

(3) concr. princes, chief rulers, 2Ch 32:9 see מִמְשָׁל No. 2 .
